title: UiPath (NYSE: PATH) lifts Q3 revenue 16% to $411M as ARR total hits $1.782B
text: UiPath announced Q3 FY2026 results with strong performance across key metrics. Revenue growth accelerated to 16% YoY reaching $411M in Q3, up from $355M in Q3 FY2025. ARR total reached $1.782B, up 11% YoY, with net new ARR of $59M. Profitability: EPS basic swung from loss of $0.02 in Q3 FY2025 to positive $0.37 in Q3 FY2026, marking significant profitability improvement. GAAP operating income $13M, Non-GAAP operating income $88M demonstrate cash generation capability. Customer metrics: Dollar-based net retention 107% shows strength in existing customer expansion. The company exceeded guidance across the board and achieved first GAAP profitable third quarter as public company. CEO Daniel Dines stated enterprises accelerating AI and automation strategies while seeking unified platform solutions. Guidance for Q4 FY2026: Revenue $462-467M, ARR $1.844-1.849B, with outlook reflecting continued momentum in agentic automation adoption. Full-year FY2026 revenue expected to reach approximately $1.61B, up 13% YoY.
